mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_project (member_id, category, template_id, options, status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{category}, #{templateId}, #{options,typeHandler=com.crown.common.typehandler.JsonObjectTypeHandler}, 'draft')
mapper.select: SELECT question_id, category, group_name, type, key_name, label, description, options_json AS optionsJson, default_val AS defaultVal, min_val AS minVal, max_val AS maxVal, sort_order AS sortOrder, required FROM sm_question WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT project_id, member_id, category, template_id, options, title, script, html_url, thumbnail_url, status, video_url, created_at, updated_at FROM sm_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT project_id, member_id, category, template_id, options, title, script, html_url, thumbnail_url, status, video_url, created_at, updated_at FROM sm_project WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sm_project SET title = #{title} WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
UPDATE sm_project SET thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl} WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_script_history (project_id, member_id, script, note) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{memberId}, #{script,typeHandler=com.crown.common.typehandler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, #{note})
mapper.select: SELECT history_id, project_id, member_id, script, note, created_at FROM sm_script_history WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE sm_job SET status = 'running', started_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE sm_job SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
